rulings.Case Title: IN RE THE MATTER OF THE GLENN AND ELSA LERNER TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Respondent Glenn A. Lerners Notice Of Motion And Motion For Relief Under Code Of Civil Procedure Section 473(B)
rulings.Rulings: Lerner's Motion for Relief is granted. Lerner's motion to compel futher responses to special interrogatories and form interrogatories was due 7/24/13 and is timely. There is no authority for counsel to unilaterally shorten time to move to compel once time has been extended. Moreover, Lerner demonstrated good cause for relief under CCP section 473. Salter and Segal's requests for reimbursement of fees and costs is denied. Prevailing party to prepare order. Any party who objects to the tentative and wishes to argue the matter must notify the court (415-551-3702) and opposing counsel by 5:00 p.m. 8/27/13.

rulings.Case Title: IN RE THE MATTER OF THE GLENN AND ELSA LERNER TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Beneficiaries|Petitioners Notice Of Motion And Motion For An Order Striking Respondent Glenn Lerners Motions To Compel Further Responses To Second Set Of Discovery; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities; Declaration Of Lori A. Lutzker
rulings.Rulings: Salter and Segal's Motion to Strike Lerner's Motion to Compel further responses to second sets of (1) special interrogatories, (2) form interrogatories, and (3) requests for admissions is denied. See tentative ruling on Lerner's Motion for Relief. Prevailing party to prepare order. Any party who objects to the tentative and wishes to argue the matter must notify the court (415-551-3702) and opposing counsel by 5:00 p.m. 8/27/13.
